title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding and trusted by brands like The New York Times and Wiz, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. The role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR—including collaboration with the Tel Aviv HQ. A hands-on leader-doer with a builder's mentality.
_note: Verified: 7+ years RevOps in high-growth B2B SaaS, scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, Salesforce expertise, and collaboration with Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years experience exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech background aligns perfectly with Finout's domain, scaling expertise and Salesforce proficiency are core strengths, and hybrid Tel Aviv/NY structure matches geographic preferences. Only minor gap is no explicit mention of revenue analytics depth in profile.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and immediately thought of you—a fintech cloud cost platform scaling with $85M+ backing needs someone who's built RevOps infrastructure at scale, and your 15+ years orchestrating GTM and pipeline forecasting in high-growth B2B SaaS is precisely what the CRO needs reporting to them. The hybrid Tel Aviv/NY structure with hands-on leadership expectations aligns with how you've operated. I think there's a real conversation here.

Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD plus benefits.

Having spent 15+ years optimizing B2B SaaS GTM systems and territory models for predictable revenue, I recognize how critical accurate territory composition is to both sales performance and forecasting accuracy. I think there could be a strong fit here, and I'd love to explore it with you.
